# Easton Radar

老花的信息差侦察站，按报告类型沉淀 AI 工具、程序员副业、独立开发、出海、平台规则和普通技术人的现金流线索。

## Report types
- 深度调查: https://radar.huadongpeng.com/reports/investigation/
- 机会拆解: https://radar.huadongpeng.com/reports/opportunity/
- 工具账本: https://radar.huadongpeng.com/reports/tool-ledger/
- 平台规则: https://radar.huadongpeng.com/reports/platform-rules/
- 案例复盘: https://radar.huadongpeng.com/reports/case-study/
- 风险避坑: https://radar.huadongpeng.com/reports/risk-warning/
